name: The Rigged Claw Machine
text: {2}, {T}: Choose a creature card in any graveyard. Roll a six-sided die. On a 5 or 6, the claw actually grips — return that card to the battlefield under your control. On a 1 through 4, the claw goes limp at the last second, as designed, and you create a Treasure as a consolation token.
flavorText: The claw's grip strength is calibrated by an accountant, not an engineer.
